name: Blackened Catfish
recipeIngredient: 4 Farm-raised catfish fillets (4 to 5 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place paprika, sage, cumin, garlic powder, sugar, salt, red pepper, and onion powder in a 1-gallon food-storage bag. Seal the bag and shake until well combined.
2. Add one fillet at a time to the bag and shake until evenly coated with the seasoning mixture.
3. Coat a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray. Add olive oil and heat over medium-low heat until hot.
4. Carefully add the catfish fillets, skin side up, to the skillet. Cook for 4 to 5 minutes until lightly blackened.
5. Gently flip the fillets with a spatula and cook for another 4 to 5 minutes, or until the fish feels firm and is opaque at its thickest part. Serve with lemon slices.
(Suggested serving: Serve with herbed rice and a refreshing cucumber salad.)
Per serving: 182 calories; 19g protein; 1g carbohydrate; 10g fat; 42mg cholesterol; 316mg sodium. Exchanges: 3 lean meat, 1/4 fat.
From WOMAN'S DAY, 8/9/94.
